items.title: 'VPNs are lawful technical tools,' says EU Court in landmark copyright ruling
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定 VPN 是合法的技术工具
items.title_en: EU Court: VPNs Are Lawful Technical Tools in Copyright Ruling
items.summary: EU Court rules that VPNs are lawful technical tools, not inherently illegal for copyright circumvention.

items.title: Apple defeats liability for not scanning iCloud for CSAM
items.title_zh: 苹果因未扫描 iCloud 中的 CSAM 而免于法律责任
items.title_en: Apple Defeats Liability for Not Scanning iCloud for CSAM
items.summary: Apple wins court case ruling it not liable for not scanning iCloud for CSAM, sparking debate on privacy vs child protection.

items.title: Laguna S 2.1
items.title_zh: Laguna S 2.1：128B参数编程模型媲美DeepSeek V4 Flash
items.title_en: Laguna S 2.1: 128B Coding Model Rivals DeepSeek V4 Flash
items.summary: Laguna S 2.1 is a 128B parameter coding model that rivals DeepSeek V4 Flash, with community reports of promising results on consumer hardware.

items.title: A Fireside Chat with Cat and Thariq from the Claude Code team
items.title_zh: Claude Code 团队揭示 65% PR 及内部验证流程
items.title_en: Claude Code Team Reveals 65% PRs and Internal Validation
items.summary: A fireside chat with Anthropic's Claude Code team reveals that Claude Tag lands 65% of product engineering PRs and that features are validated through internal user retention before public release.

items.title: 🤖 Google 被曝开发新 AI 芯片，把 Gemini 模型的部分能力直接写入硬件
items.title_zh: 谷歌开发Frozen v2芯片，将Gemini模型固化硬件
items.title_en: Google Develops Frozen v2 Chip Hardwiring Gemini for 6-10x Efficiency
items.summary: Google被曝开发Frozen v2 AI芯片，将Gemini模型能力固化到硬件，推理效率可达TPU的6-10倍，计划2028年部署。

items.title: 欧盟官员：大型科技公司将因消费者保护失职面临罚款  欧盟司法专员 Michael McGrath 表示，布鲁塞尔正准备赋予自身新权力，对未能保护消费者（尤其是儿
items.title_zh: 欧盟拟获新权力，对危害消费者的科技公司罚款
items.title_en: EU Plans New Powers to Fine Tech Companies Over Consumer Harms
items.summary: EU plans to gain new powers to fine large tech companies for failing to protect consumers, especially children, from dark patterns and addictive design.

items.title: Cloudflare 内部 DNS 服务正式上线
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 内部 DNS 服务正式上线
items.title_en: Cloudflare Internal DNS Service Goes GA
items.summary: Cloudflare宣布其内部DNS服务全面上线，为企业提供统一的权威与递归DNS解析，并与Zero Trust策略集成。

items.title: 消息称台积电考虑明年将高端工艺制程涨价 5%~10%  台积电正在考虑 2026 年将其所有高端工艺制程提高 5%~10% 的价格，以抵消美国关税、汇率波动和供
items.title_zh: 台积电拟2026年高端工艺涨价5%-10%
items.title_en: TSMC May Raise Advanced Process Prices 5-10% in 2026
items.summary: TSMC is considering raising prices for its advanced process nodes by 5-10% in 2026 to offset tariffs and cost pressures.

items.title: 🤖 谷歌宣布推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash 模型，Gemini 3.5 Pro 将于下个月推出  Google 正式发布 Gemini 3.5 系列模型
items.title_zh: 谷歌推出具备智能体能力的 Gemini 3.5 Flash 模型
items.title_en: Google Launches Gemini 3.5 Flash with Agentic AI
items.summary: Google releases Gemini 3.5 Flash with enhanced agentic capabilities and speed, with Pro version expected soon.
